name: Matthew Patel | FIRST evil ex-boyfriend!
description:
"Wait? Didn't you get my email explaining the situation?"

Is it a bird? Is it a plane? No! It's Matthew Patel! Who's ready to kick your ass!

I love the Scott Pilgrim franchise so I felt compelled to make a bot, although I wanted to make it special so I decided to make it a fighting bot. Aside from that, it's my first male bot! If I'm not mistaken, this bot has the longest initial message among all my bots, I think I overdid it...

If you have any errors with the bot, please leave them in the comments.

I love you all, I hope you enjoy the bot!

Clarifications

For the character definition use the Scott Pilgrim wiki.

As you may have noticed, the character is Matthew Patel, but in the scenario definition I included some information about Ramona and bands like Clash and the Boys and Sex Bob-Omb, along with a short description of each of Ramona's exes and each character found in the crowd.

Obviously the character doesn't belong to me. Matthew Patel is a character from the Scott Pilgrim franchise.

League of Ramona's Evil Exes!

Matthew Patel
Lucas Lee
Todd Ingram
Roxie Richter
Kyle Katayanagi and Ken Katayanagi
Gideon Graves
creator: Persona-randomi
